title: Stable-Baseline Closure / Launch-Readiness Evidence Map

phase_evidence.description: Recovery re-import of POWER_LOTTO draw 115000041 after DB restore removed it. Confirmed draw in canonical draws table.
Batch A apply plan regeneration in dry-run only. Confirmed 2 rows expected for P79. No DB writes.
Batch A controlled apply — inserted 2 production replay rows for draw 115000041. Replay row count: 46960 → 46962.
Replay UI and API visibility verification for POWER_LOTTO draw 115000041. Confirmed draw and replay rows visible via API. No DB writes.

key_metrics.note: Browser E2E known flaky — documented separately

phase_evidence.description: Monitoring and scoring pipeline verification for POWER_LOTTO draw 115000041. Read-only. No DB writes.
Read-only freshness / source gap guard for POWER_LOTTO. Fills draw-level gap not covered by /api/replay/freshness. No DB writes.

launch_readiness_checklist.description: POWER_LOTTO draw 115000041 recovered and confirmed in canonical draws table
Latest draw 115000041 (2026/05/21) is current and no draw gap detected
Batch A: 2 production replay rows applied (id=46961, id=46962), dry_run=0
Draw and replay data visible via Lottery API (port 8002)
Monitoring and scoring pipelines confirmed operational for POWER_LOTTO
Draw-level freshness guard in place; /api/replay/freshness gap documented and patched by P82

launch_readiness_checklist.note: Pre-existing flaky failure. Not P82-introduced. Not blocking. Tracked separately.

browser_e2e_note: replay-browser-e2e-validation CI check has a pre-existing flaky failure. It is NOT marked PASS. It is not P82-introduced. Must be tracked and resolved separately before operator-facing launch.

risk_register.description: replay-browser-e2e-validation CI check has pre-existing flaky failure
risk_register.resolution: Must be resolved before operator-facing launch. Not DB-related.

risk_register.description: Port 8000 vs port 8002: Lottery API runs on port 8002, not 8000. Confusion has caused false API-down reports
risk_register.resolution: Always use port 8002 for Lottery API. Document in runbooks.

risk_register.description: API date filters require slash format (YYYY/MM/DD), not dash format (YYYY-MM-DD)
risk_register.resolution: Use YYYY/MM/DD format in all date filter queries.

risk_register.description: lottery_v2.db is a local-only file. It is not staged, not committed, not replicated remotely
risk_register.resolution: Ensure DB is backed up locally before any migration. No DB is ever pushed to git.

risk_register.description: No official draw API ingestion has been performed in P77C–P82. All draws imported from uploaded source files
risk_register.resolution: Official API ingestion requires explicit authorization. Do not trigger unless authorized.

next_recommendation.title: UI/Operator Walkthrough or Launch-Readiness Signoff
next_recommendation.description: Conduct operator walkthrough of replay UI and API endpoints. Resolve browser E2E flakiness. Produce launch-readiness signoff document.
constraints: No ingestion unless new draw source explicitly authorized
Browser E2E must be PASS before marking launch READY
